title: [ARCHIVED] Aethersteel
description: Adds new aethersteel gear to the Aether, for use with Paradise Lost. Requires Endgame Reborn.
body: An addon mod to [Endgame Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/endgame-reborn) that adds aethersteel (Ascended and Lost gear) to Paradise Lost, expanding on the Aether's endgame gear.
